xsl:stylesheet.extension-element-prefixes: datetime set math dateConversion myext nestedJsonParser string strings thetaray

ns1:query.xsl:variable: as date_trans, destuserid,destaddress,destfirstname,destmerchantname,destcustomername, ,(select p.abbreviation as nationality from wallet.fine_contact_country p where nationality = p.name)as nationality_code ,(select city from wallet.cms_customer where user_id = userid)as city from WALLET.ws_log WHERE servicename in (select service_name from wallet.transactioncodes where is_financial='1') and

xsl:value-of.select: concat('select id,servicename,amounttran/100,trancurrency,mobilenumber,(select homeaddress from wallet.cms_customer where user_id = userid)as adresse,(select nationality from wallet.cms_customer where user_id = userid)as nationality,(select gender from wallet.cms_customer where user_id = userid)as gender,(select nvl(placeofbirth,nationality) as placeofb from wallet.cms_customer where user_id = userid) as placeofbirth,destaccount,nvl(DESTMOBILENUMBER,MOBILENUMBER)as DESTMOBILENUMBER,walletcurrency, ',thetaray:convertToYYYYMMDDHH24MISS(string(datetime:dateTime())),',respcode,userid,concat(firstname,lastname)as fullName, ',myext:replace(string(datetime:date(datetime:dateTime())),string('-'),string('g'),string('')),' as date_trans,',datetime:date(datetime:dateTime()),$var0,thetaray:convertToYYYYMMDDHH24MISS(string(datetime:dateTime())),$var1,myext:replace(string(java:com.fiorano.xslt.functions.datetime.DateConverter.subtractDate(datetime:date(datetime:dateTime()),'yyyy-mm-dd','1','0','0','0')),string('-'),string('g'),string('')),$var2,substring(myext:replace(string(datetime:date(datetime:dateTime())),string('-'),string('g'),string('')),'1','8'),$var3,$var4)
